subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Lord of eternity! Thou hast taken up the Pen to make mention of him who loved Thee in a day when most [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا مالک القدم قد اخذت القلم بان اذکر الذی احبک فی یوم کان اکثر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
